product: Alibaba Cloud Qwen3-Next Instruct now available in Beta
tagline: Mosaic AI Model Serving now supports Alibaba Cloud's Qwen3 Next 80B A3B Instruct as a Databricks hosted model in the us west 2 and ap northeast 1 regions.
what_it_does: Mosaic AI Model Serving now supports Alibaba Cloud's Qwen3 Next 80B A3B Instruct as a Databricks hosted model in the us west 2 and ap northeast 1 regions. This model can be accessed using Foundation Model APIs pay per token. Qwen3 Next 80B A3B Instruct is available in Beta.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
plain_summary: Mosaic AI Model Serving now supports Alibaba Cloud's Qwen3 Next 80B A3B Instruct as a Databricks hosted model in the us west 2 and ap northeast 1 regions. This model can be accessed using Foundation Model APIs pay per token.
key_takeaway: Mosaic AI Model Serving now supports Alibaba Cloud's Qwen3 Next 80B A3B Instruct as a Databricks hosted model in the us west 2 and ap northeast 1 regions.
